title: Backend engineer specialising in production-grade Node.js/TypeScript systems — multi-tenant SaaS, payment integrations, AI-powered services, and cloud-native architectures on AWS and Azure.

workDetails.name: Khefue
content: Architected and built the entire backend API for a production-grade multi-sided marketplace aggregating e-commerce, travel bookings (flights, hotels, car rentals), VTU/utility bill payments, digital gift cards, and a loyalty rewards program into a single RESTful platform.

Engineered payment orchestration across Paystack, Fincra, and VPAY with automatic fallback routing, webhook verification, and PDF receipt generation; integrated VTU and utility services via 9PBS VAS, vtPass, and multiple Nigerian telco networks.

Built a loyalty and rewards engine with points accrual (1pt per ₦2,000 spent), tiered membership with automated monthly migrations, peer-to-peer gifting, and point redemption at ₦10/pt — alongside a discount and promotions system supporting time-bound, geo-targeted, and age-targeted campaigns with usage analytics.

Implemented async job processing using Azure Queue with retry logic for failed transactions and background cron tasks (transaction validation, tier migration, birthday emails); real-time notifications via Socket.io with multi-channel delivery (email via Nodemailer/Handlebars, in-app, web push).

Applied RBAC across User, Partner, and Admin roles with permission-gated endpoints, audit logging, Redis caching with file-system fallback, rate limiting (300 req/10 min), Helmet.js security headers, and structured Winston logging with daily rotation.

workDetails.name: Devheit
content: Built core backend services for a cross-border payment platform, integrating live exchange rate feeds from third-party providers and handling multi-currency transaction flows with accuracy and reliability.

Developed backend infrastructure for an influencer-brand collaboration platform acting as a secure escrow payment gateway, enabling milestone-based fund releases and driving visibility for micro-influencers.

Contributed to a full-stack financial management app with real-time bi-directional sync via WebSocket, handling user account management, unique shareable IDs, and collaborative features across a cross-functional team.

workDetails.name: USAF
content: Built a full-stack content and social platform where users can publish posts, interact with other users' content, and communicate in real-time via Socket.io.
Integrated Monaco Editor for in-browser code snippet execution across multiple languages, and implemented OAuth-based authentication with Passport.js alongside role-gated route protection.
Deployed and managed the application on AWS, applying server-side validation and session management to ensure secure, reliable access across the platform.

workDetails.name: CHMAAS
content: Architected a multi-tenant SaaS platform for faith-based organizations with full tenant isolation using shared-schema tenantId-based data partitioning across 13+ relational models and hierarchical branch structures.
Implemented role-based access control (Admin, Worker, User) scoped per branch, with JWT access/refresh token pairs, OTP verification, and bcrypt-secured authentication.
Built automated task generation via cron jobs that assigns weekly follow-up tasks to workers and detects overdue items, with full audit trails for member status transitions and follow-up history.
Designed an event-driven email notification system decoupled via AWS SQS and Lambda, supporting onboarding, invites, OTP, and subscription event templates.
Containerized the backend using Docker multi-stage builds and established GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines deploying to AWS ECR across staging and production environments.

workDetails.name: Excel Health
content: Designed and built a microservices-based telehealth backend comprising four independently deployable services: a core API, a community forum, an AWS Lambda email dispatcher, and an API Gateway JWT authorizer — with Winston structured logging throughout.
Engineered an appointment booking engine with urgency triage (BP/blood sugar thresholds), nurse referral fallback for missing vitals, and booking limits enforced by subscription tier.

Integrated a Gemini AI-powered symptom screening chatbot with critical condition detection and nearby hospital routing, alongside Agora SDK for video consultation room provisioning and post-call review workflows.

Built a multi-role auth system supporting JWT, Google OAuth2, Apple Sign-In, HTTP-only session cookies, TOTP 2FA (speakeasy), and bcrypt — with an API Gateway custom authorizer that validates tokens, generates IAM policies, and distinguishes public vs. authenticated routes.

Implemented SOS emergency broadcasting to available nearby nurses, subscription/payment tiers with wallet and referral rewards, family guest access via device-linked invite links, and a push/WhatsApp/email notification system across all key events.

projects.name: Khefue Platform — Backend API
projects.description: Architected and built the entire backend API for a production-grade multi-sided marketplace and lifestyle platform serving customers, merchants, and administrators. Aggregates e-commerce, travel bookings (flights, hotels, car rentals), VTU/utility bill payments, digital gift cards, and a loyalty rewards program into a single unified RESTful experience. Features payment orchestration across Paystack, Fincra, and VPAY with automatic fallback, a tiered loyalty engine with peer-to-peer gifting and point redemption, async job processing via Azure Queue, real-time notifications via Socket.io, and geo/age-targeted promotions — with Redis caching, RBAC across three user types, and structured Winston logging throughout.

projects.name: Excel Health — Telehealth Platform Backend
projects.description: Architected a production-grade, microservices-based backend for a comprehensive telehealth application serving patients and medical personnel. Comprises four independently deployable services: a core API, a community forum microservice, an AWS Lambda email dispatcher, and an API Gateway JWT authorizer. Features a Gemini AI-powered symptom triage chatbot, Agora SDK video consultations, SOS emergency broadcasting, appointment booking with urgency triage, subscription tiers with wallet and referral rewards, real-time chat via Socket.io, and a multi-provider auth system (JWT, Google OAuth2, Apple Sign-In, TOTP 2FA). Deployed serverlessly via the Serverless Framework on AWS.

projects.name: CHMAAS — Church Member Management & Automated Support System
projects.description: Built a production-grade multi-tenant SaaS platform for faith-based organizations to manage members, volunteer workers, and follow-up workflows. Organizations are fully isolated as tenants with their own branches, staff, and customizable member status workflows. Features automated task assignment via cron jobs, an event-driven email system decoupled through AWS SQS and Lambda, full audit trails for member status transitions, and role-based access control scoped per branch. Deployed across staging and production environments on AWS using Docker and GitHub Actions CI/CD.

projects.name: Zedo — AI-Driven Real Estate Platform
projects.description: Contributed to the development of Zedo, an AI-enabled real estate platform aimed at simplifying property search and management. Built core features to enhance user experience for agents, landlords, and property seekers, integrating responsive UI components and real-world search interactions. Managed deployment and continuous updates to ensure a functional online presence. This project highlights practical experience in designing user-focused web applications and handling live deployment workflows.

projects.name: Financial — Infrastructure Dashboard
projects.description: Built a web-based infrastructure dashboard with a responsive interface for interacting with system data. Handled end-to-end development and deployment, demonstrating practical experience in full-stack development and cloud hosting.

moreProjects.name: Wandyte Book Sales — Online Bookstore Platform
moreProjects.description: Developed a web-based book sales platform that allows users to browse available books and interact with product listings. Implemented core e-commerce features such as dynamic product display and user-friendly navigation. Handled application deployment and hosting on Render, showcasing hands-on experience in building and deploying production-ready web applications.

Built with modern web deployment infrastructure to provide an accessible, responsive online presence for the event, enabling visitors to find relevant details and interact with the content easily. This project reflects skills in web hosting, deployment workflows, and front-end presentation design.

info: I'm Oluwatobi Akinola, a backend engineer focused on building production-grade, cloud-native systems in Node.js and TypeScript. I specialise in scalable API design, event-driven architectures, and multi-tenant SaaS platforms — with hands-on experience across fintech, healthtech, and nonprofit software.

My work spans payment orchestration (Paystack, Fincra, VPAY), microservices on AWS (Lambda, SQS, API Gateway), real-time systems with Socket.io, and AI integrations with Google Gemini. I take ownership of the full backend lifecycle — from architecture and data modelling through to deployment, security, and observability.

activityUpdates.content: I've developed a strong interest in API security and am currently taking certification courses with APISEC to deepen my understanding and strengthen my practical skills in designing and securing robust APIs.

Actively expanding my technical skill set by learning Go (Golang), a system-level programming language, and thoroughly enjoying the process of building high-performance, scalable software while deepening my understanding of efficient system design.

whatNextOpenStatus.content: I'm currently open to new opportunities and always happy to connect. Whether you have a question or a potential opportunity, feel free to reach out—I'll be glad to respond.
